html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly

Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit is an Item that can be crafted in Offerings Filter during the Year of the Dragonfly Event. It allows to spawn a Dragonfly Boat with Dragonfly Wing Mast, Dragonfly Boat Wheel, Claw Anchor and Claw Oar.

Trivia

  • This item appears to be based on the unrealized "Seafarer kit" item found in the Don't Starve: Newhome files.

Gallery

  • Unused Seafarer kit founded in the Don't Starve New Home files in 2020
plainText:
Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
"Equipped with all the draconic fixings."
Object Info
3 min.
Can be Burned
Does not stack
Crafting
×16
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"dragonboat_pack"
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly
“Boat building made easy!”
–Wilson, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“All the boat junk you could ever need in one package.”
–Willow, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Wolfgang's boat will be mighty as a dragon!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“I suppose I can make myself useful in some small way and put it together.”
–Wendy, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“A HORRIBLE BOAT WITH ITS HORRIBLE ACCESORIES”
–WX-78, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Everything I need has been conveniently collected into a singular package.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Everything's all packed and ready to go, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Here I am, toiling away for a frivolous diversion.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“It posesses all that a mighty vessel might require.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“It's got everything a boat needs!”
–Webber, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Just add water, and voila!”
–Warly, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“All the fancy Floaty bits!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“This baby's got everything you need!”
–Winona, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“A fully-stocked boat, ready to float!”
–Wortox, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“My boat, all mine!”
–Wurt, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Wow, how did they pack this all up so tightly?”
–Walter, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
“An instant boat. You've got to admire the efficiency of it.”
–Wanda, when examining a Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit
Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit is an Item that can be crafted in Offerings Filter during the Year of the Dragonfly Event. It allows to spawn a Dragonfly Boat with Dragonfly Wing Mast, Dragonfly Boat Wheel, Claw Anchor and Claw Oar.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
This item appears to be based on the unrealized "Seafarer kit" item found in the Don't Starve: Newhome files.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Unused Seafarer kit founded in the Don't Starve New Home files in 2020

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ Thuyền Chuồn Chuồn Trang Trí là một Vật Phẩm có thể được chế tạo trong Bộ Lọc Quà Tặng trong Sự Kiện Năm Chuồn Chuồn. Nó cho phép tạo ra Thuyền Chuồn Chuồn với Cột Cánh Chuồn Chuồn, Bánh Thuyền Chuồn Chuồn, Mỏ Neo Móng Vuốt và Mái Chèo Vuốt.

'''Decked-Out Dragonfly Boat Kit''' is an [[Item]] that can be crafted in [[Offerings Filter]] during the [[Year of the Dragonfly]] [[Event]]. It allows to spawn a [[Dragonfly Boat]] with [[Dragonfly Wing Mast]], [[Dragonfly Boat Wheel]], [[Claw Anchor]] and [[Claw Oar]].

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* This item appears to be based on the unrealized "[[Unimplemented_Items#Seafarer_kit|Seafarer kit]]" item found in the [[Don't Starve: Newhome]] files.
